subcodes.first_line: In the sacred Books of God mention hath been made of the Day of Revelation, and all peoples have awaited that Day. And when the Dawning-Place of command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در کتب مقدسه الهیه ذکر یوم ظهور نازل و جمیع ملل منتظر آن یوم بوده اند و چون مطلع اوامر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prophecy and fulfillment
